mapper.sql: t.id, t.project_id, t.phase_id, t.parent_task_id, t.task_name, t.task_type, t.status, t.execute_mode, t.assignee_id, t.agent_company_id, t.agent_engineer_id, t.site_info, t.device_ids, t.planned_start, t.planned_end, t.actual_start, t.actual_end, t.priority, t.description, t.attachments, t.version, t.create_time, t.update_time, p.project_name AS project_name, ph.phase_name AS phase_name, u.real_name AS assignee_name, ac.company_name AS agent_company_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM project_task t LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = t.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project_phase ph ON ph.id = t.phase_id AND ph.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = t.assignee_id AND u.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN agent_company ac ON ac.id = t.agent_company_id AND ac.deleted = 0 WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.deleted = 0

SELECT id, project_id, phase_id, parent_task_id, task_name, task_type, status, execute_mode, assignee_id, agent_company_id, agent_engineer_id, site_info, device_ids, planned_start, planned_end, actual_start, actual_end, priority, description, attachments, version, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM project_task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY phase_id, id
SELECT status, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM project_task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 GROUP BY status
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM project_task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND status = #{status} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM project_task WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0 AND status NOT IN ('COMPLETED', 'CONFIRMED')
